title: Craftable Titanium (Palladium)
description: This mod adds a crafting recipe to titanium, a rare ore used in many palladium addons. Its annoying to find as it spawns very rarely, and can be difficult to see. So instead, craft a Material Converter to combine raw iron and coal into titanium.
body:
This mod adds a crafting recipe to titanium, a rare ore used in many palladium addons. Its annoying to find as it spawns very rarely, and can be difficult to see. So instead, craft a Material Converter to combine raw iron and coal into titanium.

Big thanks to CodecReality for the KubeJS Script used. (Check out OMS on Youtube)
